text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Ines Fujin suffers an injury during training, so I
bring her to the infirmary.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm fine, I'm fine. It's nothing serious, so don't
worry.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
See, I'm all patched up now, so let's get right
back to training!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Of course I'm sure! I can barely feel the pain
anymore!

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
And I bet a bit of running will do wonders for my
mood! I mean, I love running! ♪
choice_data_list: I'm still worried, so please rest up.
As long as you don't overdo it.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Geez, you're being dramatic. I'm stronger than I look, you know.
choice_data_list: But what if your injury worsens?

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text: Ngh. Don't give me that look...

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Okay, fine. I'll rest up for today. I wouldn't want
to worry you.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A little disappointed, Ines Fujin returns to her
dorm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Nice! I knew you'd say yes! Come on, let's hit the
track!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the middle of her light jog, Ines Fujin's face
crumples up in pain.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
I'm sorry. And after I acted all cool back there.
We might have to call it a day after all...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We cut our training session short, and Ines Fujin
trudges back to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
...Phew. Looks like I should be okay if I keep the
exercises light.

text_block_list.name: Ines Fujin
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe. I'm glad I powered through training, even
with my injury.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While monitoring her injury, Ines Fujin completes
a light training session.
